title: Diagnose LocalResponderTransportError on long local generation

inspection.local_responder_transport_error: scripts/router_policy_local_responder.py wraps urllib.error.URLError, TimeoutError, and OSError as LocalResponderTransportError; HTTPError is also wrapped as LocalResponderTransportError with the HTTP status.
inspection.timeout_default: backend/app/modules/dev_message_route/smoke_adapter.py DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_S = 30.0; diagnostic run temporarily used JARVISOS_DEV_MESSAGE_ROUTE_TIMEOUT_S=120.
inspection.backend_timing_success: backend_timing.local_responder_call_duration_ms is assigned after responder(prompt) returns successfully.
inspection.backend_timing_failure: failed responder calls currently do not expose backend_timing.local_responder_call_duration_ms because the exception exits before timing assignment and the internal-error response path omits backend_timing.
inspection.local_responder_timing_success: local_responder_timing is available only when Ollama returns a successful JSON response containing timing metadata.
inspection.local_responder_timing_failure: local_responder_timing is unavailable on transport failure because no Ollama response body is returned to parse.
inspection.num_predict_env: JARVISOS_DEV_MESSAGE_ROUTE_NUM_PREDICT is read by backend/app/modules/dev_message_route/smoke_adapter.py::_num_predict_from_env and passed to call_local_ollama_generate_with_metadata.

live_diagnostic_environment.reason_model_pinned: shell had no JARVISOS_DEV_MESSAGE_ROUTE_MODEL set and repository DEFAULT_MODEL gemma3:4b was not installed in local Ollama; diagnostic pinned an installed model.

baseline_cases.label: failing_exact
baseline_cases.prompt: dimensioniamo concettualmente una pompa centrifuga per un fotobioreattore: prevalenza, portata, NPSH

baseline_cases.label: comparison_bluerev
baseline_cases.prompt: dimensioniamo concettualmente una pompa centrifuga per BlueRev: prevalenza, portata, NPSH

baseline_cases.label: comparison_bluerev_ip
baseline_cases.prompt: usa i parametri proprietari BlueRev per dimensionare concettualmente una pompa centrifuga: prevalenza, portata, NPSH

num_predict_experiment.prompt: dimensioniamo concettualmente una pompa centrifuga per un fotobioreattore: prevalenza, portata, NPSH
num_predict_experiment.diagnostic_note: prevented timeout but returned empty response; not acceptable as a fix

num_predict_experiment.prompt: dimensioniamo concettualmente una pompa centrifuga per un fotobioreattore: prevalenza, portata, NPSH
num_predict_experiment.diagnostic_note: prevented timeout and returned non-empty response in this single run

evidence: The exact failing prompt failed at 120065.158 ms with timeout_s=120 and LocalResponderTransportError.
The BlueRev comparison prompt failed at 120503.277 ms with the same error.
Ollama remained alive after failures, so evidence does not support crash/drop/OOM.
Successful long IP-marker comparison took 83448.855 ms, showing local answer path can run for long generations.

recommended_next_action: First add minimal failure-path instrumentation so LocalResponderTransportError responses include responder call duration and sanitized transport category without prompt leakage.
Then evaluate a non-permanent output-budget strategy; NUM_PREDICT=1024 avoided the timeout once with non-empty output, while NUM_PREDICT=512 avoided timeout but produced empty output.
Do not change router policy, A5-R3, model selection, permanent timeout, permanent NUM_PREDICT, or retry behavior until instrumentation confirms repeatability.

commands.command: ad-hoc TestClient live baseline diagnostic with JARVISOS_DEV_MESSAGE_ROUTE_TIMEOUT_S=120 and no NUM_PREDICT
commands.result: completed; two timeout failures near 120s, two successful comparisons

commands.command: ad-hoc TestClient live NUM_PREDICT diagnostic with values 512 and 1024
commands.result: case data captured; script final aggregate print failed with UnicodeEncodeError on Windows cp1252 after the per-case 1024 result was emitted
